title: 第 77 節
en: Munisuvrata, name of the twentieth Tirthakara, 280.
Musical instruments, different kinds, Nabhi, first king, 287 Naga, gods, 198.
Name and gotra, Karman relating to, Nami, name of the twenty-first Tirthakara, 280.
Nandivardhana, name of the elder brother of Mahavira, 193.
Occupations, the three, of men, Oggaha (avagraha), 23 n 5.
——————————————À— a Padmaprabha, name of the sixth Tirthakara, 280.
Padmila, name of a Sthavira, 288, Paggusan, 130 n 2, 296, &c.
Palyopama, a long period of time, Pandubhadra, 289.
